prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，相关专业报考热度高；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人，按近年理科占比 约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；海南大学位于海南省，对新疆考生属跨省报考 ，地域偏好因素不突出；该校在新疆招生占比约1.5%左右，属较小生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年理科考生大幅增加、招生计划小幅缩招及软科排名持续上升带来的吸引 力增强，竞争预计进一步加剧；在2025年基准9141名基础上，预测最低位次约9076名，区间8576–9576名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2023–2025 minimum rankings for Science: approximately 11610 → 9991 → 9141, with a continuous upward trend over the past three years (decreasing rank numbers), cumulative shift of about 2469 places, intensifying competition year by year; 2025 baseline approximately 9141; Science enrollment plan: 2023: 100 → 2024: 62 → 2025: 95 → 2026: 93, a slight reduction of 2 students (-2.1%) in 2026 compared to 2025, slightly exacerbating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continuously rising: 2021: 144th → 2022: 130th → 2023: 118th → 2024: 104th → 2025: 93rd → 2026: 87th, steadily improving, enhancing comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing attractiveness to candidates; 2023 reputation slightly negative (teacher non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing incident), 2024 neutral/mixed (score line controversy); Douyin popularity ranking 32nd, rated as 'relatively hot', short video exposure moderately high, application attention somewhat warming; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; the university is known for agriculture, forestry, law, computer science, etc., with related majors attracting high social attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, with high application heat for related majors; Xinjiang 2025 Science candidates approximately 52,538, 2026 total candidates approximately 238,000, estimated Science candidates in 2026 about 163,000 based on recent Science proportion of about 68.6%, a significant increase from 2025, sharply intensifying competition; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, cross-province application for Xinjiang candidates, regional preference factor not prominent; the university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is about 1.5%, a relatively small source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant increase in 2026 Science candidates, slight reduction in enrollment plan, and enhanced attractiveness from continuously rising Soft Science rankings, competition is expected to further intensify; based on the 2025 baseline of 9141, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9076, with a range of 8576–9576.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1379 → 4040 → 1952, with significant fluctuations: in 2024 it dropped sharply to 4040, rebounding to 1952 in 2025, with an overall backward shift of about 573 positions over the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1952; liberal arts enrollment plans: 26 in 2023 → 66 in 2024 → 33 in 2025 → 31 in 2026, with a slight reduction of 2 students (-6.1%) in 2026 compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising: 144th in 2021 → 130th in 2022 → 118th in 2023 → 104th in 2024 → 93rd in 2025 → 87th in 2026, with a steady improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing its appeal to candidates; in 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (teacher non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing incident), in 2024 it was neutral/mixed (score line controversy); Douyin popularity ranking 32nd, rated as "relatively hot", with medium-to-high short video exposure, and rising application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; the university's law, accounting, Chinese language and literature, and other liberal arts majors have high social attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as law, Chinese language and literature, and accounting are trending from hot to differentiated observation, with stable application enthusiasm; in 2025, Xinjiang had approximately 24,010 liberal arts candidates, and in 2026, total candidates are about 238,000; estimated at about 31.4% liberal arts proportion, the 2026 liberal arts candidates are about 75,000, a significant increase from 2025, sharply intensifying competition; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, which is a cross-provincial application for Xinjiang candidates, with no prominent regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is about 1.5%, making it a smaller source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant increase in liberal arts candidates in 2026, the slight reduction in enrollment plans, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, competition is expected to further intensify; based on the 2025 baseline of 1952, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1911, with a range of 1567–2255.
